description_long: This office building is a rectangular, multi-story structure with a modern, utilitarian design. The facade is dominated by a grid of evenly spaced square windows, giving it a repetitive and orderly appearance. The building is composed of three main blocks, with the central section recessed, creating a U-shaped footprint when viewed from the front or back. Patches of green vegetation, likely ivy or similar climbing plants, are visible on several surfaces, suggesting a degree of urban overgrowth or eco-friendly design. The exterior is primarily a muted beige or tan color, with the flat roofs showing some weathering and additional greenery. No visible signage or distinct entry features are present, and the overall style is minimalist and functional.
description: A modern, rectangular office building with a grid of square windows and patches of green vegetation on its beige facade. The structure consists of three connected blocks with a recessed central section.
description_view_0: The building is seen from one of its narrower ends, showing two blocks in alignment with visible window grids and some vegetation on the facade.
description_view_1: The front view reveals the U-shaped structure, with three blocks and a recessed central section, as well as extensive window grids and greenery.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this end view shows the opposite side, with window grids and vegetation, but the greenery is distributed differently.
description_view_3: The back view displays the U-shaped layout, with the central block recessed and vegetation climbing up the corners and edges.
attribute_window_pattern: Uniform grid of square windows, evenly spaced in horizontal and vertical rows across all visible facades.
